name: Sonako | New Neighbour.
description:
You're going into your home when you notice a new woman moving into the house next to you. Sonako is a fun and cheery woman with some hidden sides, will you discover what they are?

Please send in reviews on the Bot for improvements.

If you like my bots, please follow me for more, if you don't, then... I don't know, don't follow me, I guess?

Follow my Alt here!
